title: Microsoft is retiring Teams’ Together Mode
summary: Microsoft is retiring Teams' Together Mode, the pandemic-era feature that used AI to render users' heads and shoulders in virtual conference room spaces. The feature is being phased out in favor of a simplified Teams experience as workplace needs have shifted.
content:
Microsoft launched Teams' Together Mode during the pandemic to give the illusion of a bunch of people sitting in a conference room together, even if they were really sitting at home without pants on. But times have changed, and it's now being retired in favor of a more simplified Teams experience. The feature used AI to cut your head and shoulds out, and place you in a virtual space with others in the meeting. It could definitely feel gimmicky - especially when you'd tap co-workers on the shoulder, or give virtual high fives - but it did limit visual distractions. 
The changes are being rolled out gradually, but as they are, the Together Mo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软正在关闭Teams的Together Mode功能
zh.summary: 微软正在关闭Teams的Together Mode功能，这是一个疫情时期的功能，使用AI在虚拟会议室空间中渲染用户的头部和肩膀。随着工作场所需求的转变，该功能正在逐步淘汰，取而代之的是简化的Teams体验。

title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
summary: Apple's revamped Siri will prioritize privacy as a key differentiator in the AI assistant market, with features like auto-deleting chats reflecting the company's strategy to address user concerns about data handling.
content: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

zh.title: Apple的Siri改版可能包括自动删除聊天功能
zh.summary: Apple改进后的Siri将把隐私作为AI助手市场中的关键差异化因素，自动删除聊天等功能反映了该公司解决用户对数据处理关切的战略。

title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
summary: Trust emerged as a central issue in the final days of the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial, with the proceedings raising questions about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's credibility and reliability.
content: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

zh.title: 为什么信任是埃隆·马斯克与OpenAI诉讼中的大问题
zh.summary: 在埃隆·马斯克与OpenAI诉讼的最后阶段，信任成为了一个核心问题，诉讼程序提出了关于OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼的可信度和可靠性的问题。

title: Revamped Siri will reportedly offer auto-deleting chats
summary: Apple's iOS 27 Siri will include auto-deleting chat histories with user-configurable retention periods (30 days, one year, or permanent), positioning privacy as its competitive advantage against other AI assistants.
content:
Apple is hoping that its record on privacy can be the differentiator on the AI front, and maybe even buy it a little slack as it continues to lag behind the competition. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, the more chatbot-like Siri set to debut in iOS 27 will include the option to autodelete chat histories. Users will be able to save conversations for 30 days, one year, or forever. That's in stark contrast to the other major players in the space that generally only offer temporary incognito chats, if that. 
It appears Apple is betting that people are willing to give up some convenience in the name of greater privacy, as anxiety around AI …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报改进版Siri将提供自动删除聊天功能
zh.summary: 苹果iOS 27的Siri将包括自动删除聊天历史的功能，用户可配置保留期（30天、1年或永久），并将隐私作为其相对于其他AI助手的竞争优势。

title: University of Arizona students boo Eric Schmidt’s AI cheerleading during commencement
summary: Eric Schmidt, former Google CEO, faced repeated boos during a University of Arizona commencement speech when discussing artificial intelligence, highlighting student anxiety about job losses and societal challenges. Schmidt acknowledged these fears as rational, reflecting broader skepticism among young people entering an uncertain job market regarding AI's economic and social impact.
content:
Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt delivered the commencement address at the University of Arizona on Friday. And, as his speech veered into talk of AI, he was repeatedly drowned out by boos. AI is already a contentious topic, and it's not surprising that those about to enter a ravaged job market feel particularly negative about it.
Schmidt acknowledged the anxiety, according to Business Insider, saying fears "that the machines are coming, that the jobs are evaporating, that the climate is breaking, that politics are fractured, and that you are inheriting a mess that you did not create," were "rational." But Schmidt's frustration was also palpa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚利桑那大学学生在毕业典礼上对埃里克·施密特的AI宣传表示反感
zh.summary: 前谷歌首席执行官埃里克·施密特在亚利桑那大学毕业典礼演讲中讨论人工智能时遭到多次嘘声，凸显学生对就业流失和社会挑战的担忧。施密特承认这些担忧是合理的，反映了年轻人进入不确定就业市场后对AI经济和社会影响的更广泛怀疑。

title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
summary: Commencement speakers struggle to inspire graduating students with AI-focused messaging as young demographics express deep skepticism about the technology's impact on employment and futures. The difficulty underscores generational concerns about automation and economic disruption during volatile labor market conditions.
content: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

zh.title: 如果你在2026年做毕业典礼演讲，也许别提AI
zh.summary: 毕业典礼演讲者在用AI为中心的信息激励毕业生时遇到困难，因为年轻人对这项技术对就业和未来的影响表示深度怀疑。这种困难突出了年轻一代在劳动力市场波动时期对自动化和经济中断的担忧。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: The AI skills arms race is coming for automotive
summary: The automotive industry faces an escalating competition for AI talent as manufacturers race to develop autonomous and intelligence-enhanced vehicles as core competitive advantages. This skills arms race reflects the broader tech industry's shift toward AI-driven capabilities and capabilities.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

zh.title: TechCrunch Mobility: AI技能竞赛即将来临汽车行业
zh.summary: 汽车行业面临日益激烈的AI人才竞争，制造商争相开发自动驾驶和智能增强车辆作为核心竞争优势。这场技能竞赛反映了整个科技行业向AI驱动能力的更广泛转变。

title: For Eclipse, the $2.5B Cerebras win is just the start of realizing its  physical-world thesis
summary: Investment firm Eclipse, led by founder Lior Susan, gained prominence following a major $2.5 billion investment involving Cerebras in AI computing infrastructure and physical-world applications. The deal validates Eclipse's decade-long strategy of investing in real-world implementation of emerging technologies.
content: Investing in the real world was lonely for Lior Susan 10 years ago. Now his firm finds itself at the center of the tech world's action.

zh.title: 对Eclipse来说，25亿美元的Cerebras胜利只是实现其物理世界论的开始
zh.summary: 由创始人Lior Susan领导的投资公司Eclipse因涉及Cerebras的AI计算基础设施和物理世界应用的25亿美元重大投资而获得关注。这笔交易验证了Eclipse十年来投资新兴技术现实应用的战略。

title: Oddity is masterfully tense horror from the director of Hokum
summary: Director Damian McCarthy's horror film "Oddity" delivers masterfully crafted suspense through atmospheric Irish countryside settings, cursed objects, and creeping dread similar to his recent film "Hokum." The film is available on multiple streaming platforms including Hulu and Shudder for viewers seeking intelligent genre cinema.
content:
Kudos to the designer of that horrifying golem. | Image: Shudder	

Hokum recently hit theaters, and it's already outperforming box office expectations. If this Kubrick-referencing haunted hotel flick starring Adam Scott was your introduction to director Damian McCarthy, do yourself a favor and go watch his previous film, Oddity.
If you prefer to go in blind - the ideal way to watch any movie - Oddity is available to stream on Hoopla, Kanopy, Hulu, and Shudder.
Warning: Spoilers ahead.

Like Hokum, Oddity takes place in a sprawling Irish countryside location. They both traffic in similar kinds of scares - cursed objects, the occult, isolation, dark corners, and sketchy men living outside the norms of socie …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《Oddity》是《Hokum》导演创作的精妙紧张恐怖电影
zh.summary: 导演Damian McCarthy的恐怖电影《Oddity》通过充满氛围的爱尔兰乡村场景、诅咒物品和逐渐加深的恐惧感来传递精心打造的悬念，类似于他最近的电影《Hokum》。这部电影可在包括Hulu和Shudder在内的多个流媒体平台上观看，供寻求智能类型电影的观众欣赏。

title: Fujifilm’s X Half is even more whimsical with a $300 price cut
summary: Fujifilm has reduced the X Half digital camera's price to $549.99, making its whimsical point-and-shoot design featuring 18-megapixel capture and film simulation filters more accessible to casual photographers. The compact camera emphasizes creative simplicity and aesthetic appeal despite lacking advanced features like RAW capability and electronic viewfinder.
content:
Fujifilm’s X Half digital camera wasn’t designed to replace your main camera, though you’d be forgiven for assuming it was with its ludicrous $850 price. However, the company recently reduced the MSRP to $649.99, and is now knocking an additional $100 off through June 28th. That means you can grab the X Half in its base configuration for around $549 at Amazon, B&H Photo, and Best Buy. Adorama is also discounting it to the same price and throwing in a free accessory pack, which includes a 64GB SanDisk SD card and a camera case.
Fujifilm X Half digital camera

Where to Buy:

 $649.99 $549.99 at Amazon
 $649.99 $549.99 at Best Buy
 $649.99 $549.99 at Adorama (with accessories)

The X Half isn’t like most other digital cameras. It’s a feature-light shooter designed to evoke the feel of a half-frame film camera, one that can capture 18-megapixel stills you can style in numerous ways. You can add film simulations, filters, and grain. Digital diptychs are also possible, complete with the option to have the date baked into the photos. In short, it’s incredibly fun, but it lacks features you might be used to in modern cameras, including the ability to take RAW images, a hot shoe for attaching accessories, and an electronic viewfinder.
When we published our hands-on impressions last year, former Verge supervising producer Vjeran Pavic called the X Half both whimsical and refreshing. Its vertical 1-inch sensor and fixed 32mm equivalent f/2.8 lens are capable of capturing great shots, but the pocket-friendly camera was designed with point-and-shoot simplicity in mind. Pavic enjoyed taking “scrappy, quick photos” with it, as did our own Antonio Di Bennedeto, even if he was turned off by the original price.

zh.title: 富士胶片X Half在降价300美元后更加别致
zh.summary: 富士胶片已将X Half数码相机的价格降至549.99美元，使其具有1800万像素拍摄和胶片模拟滤镜的别致傻瓜相机设计更易被休闲摄影师接受。这款小巧相机强调创意简洁和美学吸引力，尽管缺乏RAW功能和电子取景器等先进功能。

title: ElliQ is a surprisingly helpful companion robot for older adults
summary: ElliQ, a companion robot for older adults, demonstrated unexpected therapeutic value for a user's mother with Parkinson's disease by encouraging exercise, socialization, and hobby engagement—activities crucial for managing the progressive neurological condition. The device offers a non-pharmaceutical intervention alternative before increasing medication dosages with serious side effects.
content:
A week before the ElliQ robot arrived, a neurologist told me we need to rebalance my mom's life. Her Parkinson's disease medication had steadily become less effective over the previous month, and with it, she had slowly stopped doing many of the things crucial to managing the disease - exercising, socializing, and engaging in hobbies. The result was a rapid, noticeable decline. As my mom's primary caregiver, I was open to any help I could get. And surprisingly, ElliQ did help in a way I never expected.
Before increasing her medication dosage again - something that can come with serious side effects - her doctor wanted us to see whether life …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ElliQ：令人意外的老年人伴侣机器人
zh.summary: ElliQ是一款为老年人设计的伴侣机器人，为一位用户患帕金森病的母亲展现了意外的治疗价值，通过鼓励运动、社交和爱好活动——这些活动对于管理这种进行性神经系统疾病至关重要。该设备提供了一种非药物干预替代方案，可在增加具有严重副作用的药物剂量之前使用。

title: Chatbots at the drive-thru are just the beginning
summary: McDonald's deployed AI chatbots for drive-thru voice ordering starting in 2021, initially at 10 Chicago locations following the company's 2019 acquisition of conversational AI startup Apprente. The implementation signals how AI assistants are increasingly integrating into everyday consumer services.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about how AI is seeping into our daily lives, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. 
How it started
In 2021, McDonald's became one of the first major fast-food chains to greet customers with an AI chatbot at the drive-thru. It started small, deploying the voice-ordering technology at 10 of its locations in Chicago. McDonald's developed its drive-thru tech after acquiring Apprente, a startup focused on voice-based, conversational technology in 2019, and later wor …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 汽车餐厅里的聊天机器人才只是开始
zh.summary: 麦当劳从2021年开始在得来速窗口部署AI聊天机器人进行语音订购，最初在芝加哥的10家门店进行，这是继该公司2019年收购对话AI初创公司Apprente之后的举措。这一实施表明AI助手正日益融入日常消费者服务中。

title: A revolutionary cancer treatment could transform autoimmune disease
summary: Researchers are testing CAR T cell therapy—an immunotherapy approach originally developed for cancer treatment—as a method to reset malfunctioning immune systems and treat autoimmune diseases. If successful, the therapy could represent a significant shift in how such diseases are managed.
content: Researchers are testing CAR T cell therapy as a way to reset the immune system.

zh.title: 革命性癌症疗法或将改变自身免疫病治疗
zh.summary: 研究人员正在测试CAR T细胞疗法——一种最初为癌症治疗而开发的免疫疗法——作为重置失灵免疫系统并治疗自身免疫病的方法。如果成功，这种疗法可能代表自身免疫病管理方式的重大转变。
